message:
fix(web): use direct scrolling for wheel events instead of momentum

The sequence grid scrolling was broken on desktop (Chrome) with jerky,
inconsistent behavior and flickering. Root cause analysis found that
wheel events were fighting with the VirtualScroller's momentum system:

Problem:
- Each wheel event overwrote velocity (velocity = delta * 0.3) and
  tried to start momentum animation
- Momentum was decaying velocity while wheel events kept resetting it
- Desktop trackpads/mice already have native momentum - adding
  VirtualScroller momentum created "double momentum" and fighting

Fix:
- Wheel events now use direct scrollBy() instead of momentum
- Stop any ongoing momentum when wheel input arrives (clean handoff)
- Touch fling gestures still use momentum as designed

The momentum system is designed for touch FLING gestures where:
- User lifts finger with velocity
- No more input events arrive
- Momentum animates the deceleration

For wheel events, the input device handles its own momentum.

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)
